title: Crowds At Pack
description: A kitchen-sink modpack that is perpetually updated for the Crowds At Community.
body:
# The **Crowds At Pack** is a perpetually evolving Modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1.
This pack is curated for the Crowds At community as a "kitchen-sink" style pack.
The pack has a large variety of mods from quality of life mods such as inventory tweaks, to fantastical and magical mods such as Ars Nouveau and more.

Here are some of our favorite mods of the pack:
- Tinker's Construct
- Ad Astra
- Farmer's Delight
- Create
- Immersive Engineering
- Decocraft
- Productive Bees
- Macaw's Mods (Furniture, Windows, Etc.)
- And More!

## It requires at least 8 GB of RAM to ensure smooth gameplay.
First time launch will most likely take longer than subsequent launches, allow at least 5 minutes of boot time. We recommend using Faithful x32 resource pack.
